config.title: Eksport slownikow do BCS
config.script:
function eksport_magazynow dim bcs_module:set bcs_module = doc_.getmodule(60258) bcs_module.generate_stores_dictionary page_.ctrl(999).value end function
function eksport_produktow dim bcs_module:set bcs_module = doc_.getmodule(60258) dim idMag : idMag = trans_.findobjid(10160,"strNazwa='" + page_.ctrl(1000).value + "'") dim pMag : set pMag = nothing if idMag > 0 then set pMag = trans_.getobj(10160,idMag) end if bcs_module.generate_products_dictionary nothing , page_.ctrl(1001).value end function
